plugins.name: ag-capital-analyst
plugins.description: Multi-agent investment analysis team: six analyst subagents (Buffett, Growth, Technical, Fundamentals, Sentiment, Valuation/DCF) feed a Risk Manager and an independent QC reviewer, producing a buy/sell/hold recommendation with position sizing, bull/base/bear scenarios, and a tracked thesis.

plugins.name: ppm-risk-review
plugins.description: Family-office-grade due diligence on a Private Placement Memorandum or other private-fund offering document. Produces a CIO risk memo (with industry benchmarking, a three-variant Risk-Radar stress test (equity, credit, and land) against historical and through-cycle norms, an uncertainty map, and a post-close monitoring protocol), sponsor diligence questionnaire, and plain-English summary in Markdown (Word optional on request), and ingests any linked YouTube deal-review video transcript as corroborating evidence.
